'''Corlin Quarle Deld''' was one of the co-founders of the [[Verkuylian BactaCo]].

==Biography==
Years before there was any sort of government on [[Verkuyl]], Deld bought the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the hopes that he could make some sort of profit off the planets vast resources, such as the [[Alazhi/Legends|alazhi]] forests. In order to do this, he began building massive factories and hiring workers as indentured servants from across the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. From this came the genesis of an economy that helped create a government on the planet. Verukyl's government soon became very wealthy with Corlin Deld as the head. However, his role as a leader soon changed when the tyrannical regime known as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] came to [[Imperialization/Legends|nationalize]] the planet.

Deld created many secret passageways in the company's headquarters (later the Imperial Governor's Hall), that his grandson [[Daven Quarle]] and the [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] agent [[Selby Jarrad]] used during the liberation of [[Verkuyl]] from the Empire.
